simple_types.name: Wcwidth_Level

enumeration_literals.name: Unknown
enumeration_literals.description:
wcwidth() probe was inconclusive or not performed.
Causes Refine_Unicode_Level to return Env_Level unchanged.

enumeration_literals.name: Unicode_3
enumeration_literals.description:
Locale supports at least Unicode 3.0.
U+28FF (WCW_SENTINEL_UNI3) returned column width >= 1.

enumeration_literals.name: Unicode_13
enumeration_literals.description:
Locale supports at least Unicode 13.0.
U+1FB38 (WCW_SENTINEL_UNI13) returned column width >= 1.

record_types.name: Optional_Wcwidth_Level

subprograms.name: Refine_Unicode_Level
subprograms.code:
function Refine_Unicode_Level
  (Env_Level : Termicap.Unicode.Unicode_Level; Wcw_Level : Wcwidth_Level) return Termicap.Unicode.Unicode_Level
